title: Figure 7 in A novel rapid visual detection assay for Toxoplasma gondii combining recombinase-aided amplification and lateral flow dipstick coupled with CRISPR-Cas13a fluorescence (RAA-Cas13a-LFD)
author: Zhao, Jinhong
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 7. Specificity of T. gondii detection by RAA-LFD and qPCR detection. (A) Visual inspection of RAA-Cas13a-LFD. (B) Curves for qPCR. Strip and curves: 1. Human blood; 2. Ascaris lumbricoides; 3. Digramma interrupta; 4. Entamoeba coli; 5. Fasciola gigantica; 6. Plasmodium vivax; 7. Schistosoma japonicum; 8. Taenia solium; 9. Trichinella spiralis; PP: Positive plasmid of T. gondii; NTC: negative control (ddH2O).
